name: Robert Plaudis (Platina)
description: After releasing his track "Santa Claus" in early December 2019, Robert decided that he needed to shoot a music video for it. Platina filmed the first part of the video in the snow-covered mountains of Switzerland in the city of Zermatt, and then returned to Moscow to shoot the second part of the video against the backdrop of a big city, high-rise buildings, and bright lights.
creator: Tenzaaa
